items.title: Why Broadcom Stock Soared Today
items.description: Gemini 3 is set to be a powerful growth driver for the semiconductor leader.

items.title: Fidelity’s Rohit Mahna to Exit. Here’s Who Is Taking Over His Role
items.description: Rohit Mahna, head of client growth at Fidelity Institutional Wealth Management Services, is leaving the company, a Fidelity spokeswoman confirmed.  The company is tapping two longtime executives to take over Mahna’s duties: Marc Squires and Trevor Norton.  Mahna didn’t respond to a request for comment and it’s unclear if he’s leaving to join another company.

items.title: Anthropic launches Claude Opus 4.5 as Google's Gemini 3 gains big backers
items.description: Anthropic on Monday debuted its Claude Opus 4.5, which the company says is its most powerful AI model yet.

items.title: Alphabet's Gemini poses a serious threat to OpenAI's ChatGPT, Jim Cramer says
items.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer explained why he thinks Gemini could be ChatGPT's biggest challenger.

items.title: Wall Street Weighs New AI Stock Fear: Why Google Winning Could Be 'Risk To Watch'
items.description: The new Gemini 3 model from Google parent company Alphabet is boosting Google stock.  Google's Gemini 3 debuted last week to rave reviews.  Google shares are rising nearly 5% on Monday after rallying 8% last week.
